channel.title: My New Hugo Site
channel.description: Recent content on My New Hugo Site

item.title: Htdp
item.description: Table Of Contents Resources Arithmetic Please complete the readings or watch the videos before class. This will allow us to focus on problem solving during the labs. Resources Design Recipes Summary Cheat Sheet Light Videos This page has links to very shorty videos that parallel many of the topics below. Arithmetic What is computation? Performing arithmetic in BSL. Primitive types: Number, Image, Boolean, String Define constants Simple animations with animate Predicate functions Using the Dr.

item.title: Lorem Ipsum
